summary: Plan to refactor Step 3 (Scene Director) and Step 4 (Prompt Writer) in the video pipeline. Step 3 will be simplified to only handle scene structure decisions (camera, timing, action, characters). Visual detail fields (costume_note, lighting_and_atmosphere, background_and_extras) will be removed from Step 3 and handled entirely by Step 4 using existing reference data (character sheets, World Bible, locations). Includes two open questions about crowd type hints and special lighting cases.
